---
title: "Topplaktat, %VO2maks, W/kg og %MAP ved 4mmol vs TTU"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(effsize)

df_utfall <- data.frame(
  FP = 1:17,
  TTE = c(3600, 2483, 3600, 3600, 2317, 3600, 1937, 3600, 1536,
          2518, 3600, 1757, 3600, 3600, 3600, 3600, 3600),
  Topplaktat = c(12.06, 13.41, 17.38, 15.05, 11.01, 13.38, 12.57, 15.14,
                 13.90, 12.39, 15.57, 10.23, 12.71, 9.60, 18.24, 16.41, 15.97),
  VO2maks_pst = c(86.5, 84.1, 78.3, 82.1, 89.4, 78.9, 80.3, 80.5, 86.1,
                  82.9, 83.3, 85.4, 84.1, 81.6, 82.4, 75.9, 80.3)
)

df_utfall$Gruppe <- ifelse(df_utfall$TTE >= 3600, "Fullforte", "Avbrot")
df_utfall$Gruppe <- factor(df_utfall$Gruppe, levels = c("Fullforte", "Avbrot"))

deskr <- df_utfall %>%
  group_by(Gruppe) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    Topplaktat_mean = mean(Topplaktat),
    Topplaktat_sd   = sd(Topplaktat),
    VO2_mean        = mean(VO2maks_pst),
    VO2_sd          = sd(VO2maks_pst),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
print(deskr)

# Welch's t-test og Cohen's d
analyser_variabel <- function(variabel, navn) {
  formula <- as.formula(paste(variabel, "~ Gruppe"))
  
  t_res <- t.test(formula, data = df_utfall, var.equal = FALSE)
  d_res <- cohen.d(formula, data = df_utfall)
  
  cat("\n--- ", navn, " ---\n", sep = "")
  cat(sprintf("Fullf??rt: %.2f ?? %.2f\n",
              mean(df_utfall[[variabel]][df_utfall$Gruppe == "Fullforte"]),
              sd(df_utfall[[variabel]][df_utfall$Gruppe == "Fullforte"])))
  cat(sprintf("Avbr??t:   %.2f ?? %.2f\n",
              mean(df_utfall[[variabel]][df_utfall$Gruppe == "Avbrot"]),
              sd(df_utfall[[variabel]][df_utfall$Gruppe == "Avbrot"])))
  cat(sprintf("t(%.2f) = %.2f, p = %.3f, d = %.2f\n",
              t_res$parameter,
              t_res$statistic,
              t_res$p.value,
              d_res$estimate))
}

analyser_variabel("Topplaktat", "Topplaktat fra 2-min")
analyser_variabel("VO2maks_pst", "%VO2maks ved 4 mmol??L?????")

```


```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(effsize)

# Data
df <- data.frame(
  FP = 1:17,
  Watt_4mmol = c(325, 365, 270, 325, 305, 330, 270, 330, 255, 240,
                 225, 340, 315, 205, 220, 270, 280),
  Vekt_kg = c(77.3, 88.1, 73.5, 72.2, 84.6, 80.2, 68.5, 79.5, 64.0, 55.5,
              54.2, 80.4, 78.7, 65.1, 52.7, 76.9, 81.4),
  MAP = c(383, 450, 353, 401, 341, 416, 344, 431, 306, 301,
          279, 406, 388, 263, 279, 362, 360),
  Gruppe = c("Fullforte", "Avbrot", "Fullforte", "Fullforte", "Avbrot",
             "Fullforte", "Avbrot", "Fullforte", "Avbrot", "Avbrot",
             "Fullforte", "Avbrot", "Fullforte", "Fullforte", "Fullforte",
             "Fullforte", "Fullforte")
)

# Beregn watt/kg og % av MAP
df$Watt_per_kg <- df$Watt_4mmol / df$Vekt_kg
df$Watt_pct_MAP <- (df$Watt_4mmol / df$MAP) * 100

# Statistikk per gruppe
df %>%
  group_by(Gruppe) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    Watt_mean = mean(Watt_4mmol),
    Watt_sd = sd(Watt_4mmol),
    Watt_per_kg_mean = mean(Watt_per_kg),
    Watt_per_kg_sd = sd(Watt_per_kg),
    Watt_pct_MAP_mean = mean(Watt_pct_MAP),
    Watt_pct_MAP_sd = sd(Watt_pct_MAP)
  ) %>%
  print(width = Inf)

# Welch's t-test
cat("\n--- Absolutt watt ---\n")
t1 <- t.test(Watt_4mmol ~ Gruppe, data = df)
d1 <- cohen.d(df$Watt_4mmol ~ df$Gruppe)
print(t1)
print(d1)

cat("\n--- Watt/kg ---\n")
t2 <- t.test(Watt_per_kg ~ Gruppe, data = df)
d2 <- cohen.d(df$Watt_per_kg ~ df$Gruppe)
print(t2)
print(d2)

cat("\n--- % av MAP ---\n")
t3 <- t.test(Watt_pct_MAP ~ Gruppe, data = df)
d3 <- cohen.d(df$Watt_pct_MAP ~ df$Gruppe)
print(t3)
print(d3)

```


```{r}

# Data
topplaktat <- c(12.06, 13.41, 17.38, 15.05, 11.01, 13.38, 12.57, 15.14, 
                13.90, 12.39, 15.57, 10.23, 12.71, 9.60, 18.24, 16.41, 15.97)

status <- c("Fullforte", "Fullforte", "Avbrot", "Fullforte", "Avbrot", 
            "Fullforte", "Fullforte", "Fullforte", "Fullforte", "Avbrot",
            "Fullforte", "Avbrot", "Avbrot", "Avbrot", "Fullforte", 
            "Fullforte", "Fullforte")


prosent_4mmol_av_topp <- 4 / topplaktat * 100


# Resultater per gruppe
oppsummer <- function(verdier, gruppenavn) {
  cat("\n", gruppenavn, " (n = ", length(verdier), ")\n", sep = "")
  cat("Gjennomsnitt +/- SD: ", round(mean(verdier), 1), " +/- ", round(sd(verdier), 1), " %\n", sep = "")
  cat("Min-maks: ", round(min(verdier), 1), "-", round(max(verdier), 1), " %\n", sep = "")
}

oppsummer(prosent_4mmol_av_topp, "Totalt")
oppsummer(prosent_4mmol_av_topp[status == "Fullforte"], "Fullforte")
oppsummer(prosent_4mmol_av_topp[status == "Avbrot"], "Avbrot")


# Welch
cat("\nWelchs t-test (Fullforte vs Avbrot):\n")
print(t.test(prosent_4mmol_av_topp ~ status))

```
